## Scope

Keep this small and focused.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Change is documented or self-explanatory
- [ ] No secrets or private data
- [ ] No fake production/user claims
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes

## Suggested Files

List likely files or folders to inspect.
